back_translation: And I received a measuring-stick like a staff, and there was a voice saying, ‘Stand up and measure the temple of God, the altar, and those who worship in the temple
But the outer courtyard of the temple, leave out and do not measure, because it has been given to the Gentiles. And they will trample the holy city for forty-two months
And We will give authority to Our two witnesses. They will prophesy for one-thousand-two-hundred-sixty days, dressed in sackcloth’
These witnesses are the two olive-trees and the two lampstands that stand before the face of the Lord of the earth
And if anyone wants to harm them, fire will come out of their mouths and will devour their enemies. And if anyone wants to harm them, that person must be killed in this manner

They have authority to shut up the heavens, so that no rain falls during the days of their prophecy, and they have authority over waters, to turn waters into blood, and to strike the earth with every kind of plague as often as they desire
And when they have completed their testimony, the wild-beast that ascends from the deep abyss will make war with them, and will overcome them, and will kill them
And the corpses of them will lie on the street of the great city, which is called figuratively Sodom and Egypt, where their Lord was also crucified
And from peoples, every tribe, every tongue, and every nation, will look at the corpses of them for three-and-a-half days, and will not allow the corpses of them to be buried in a tomb
And those who dwell on the earth will rejoice and celebrate over them, and will send gifts to one another, because these two prophets have tormented those who dwell on the earth
And after three-and-a-half days, the breath of life from God entered them. And they stood up on their feet, and great fear fell on those who were watching them
And they heard a loud voice from heaven saying to them, ‘Come up here.’ And they ascended into the sky in the cloud, and their enemies watched them

And in that hour, a great earthquake occurred, and one-tenth of the city collapsed. And in that earthquake, seven thousand people were killed, and the rest became afraid, and gave glory to the God of heaven
The second woe has passed away. Behold, the third woe is coming quickly

And the seventh angel blew the trumpet, and there were loud voices in heaven saying, ‘The kingdom of the world has become the kingdom of our Lord and of His Christ. And He will reign forever and ever’
And the twenty-four elders, who sit on their thrones before the face of God, fell down on their faces and worshiped God
Saying, ‘We thank You, the Lord God, the One of great mighty-power, the One who exists and the One who has existed, because You have taken Your great mighty-power, and have begun to reign

And the nations were enraged, and Your wrath has come. And the time when the dead will be judged, and to reward Your slaves, namely the prophets, the saints, and those who fear Your name, both small and great. And to destroy those who destroy the earth’
And the temple of God in heaven was opened, and the ark of the covenant of His appeared in His temple. And there were lightning-flashes, voices, thunders, an earthquake, and a great hail
